title: Shop Act Registration Chennai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Shop and establishment registration in Chennai under Tamil Nadu Shops Act. License application and renewal. Call +91-99622 60333.
bodyText:
Looking for shop and establishment registration in Chennai? Virtual Auditor handles complete Shops and Establishments Act registration in Chennai under the Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Act, 1947. From application filing through license issuance, we manage the entire process.

What is Shop Act Registration Chennai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Shop and Establishment Registration Certificate under the Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Act, 1947. Application filing with the Labour Department (Inspector of Labour). Document preparation — address proof, PAN, identity proof, list of employees, nature of business. Registration for all types of establishments — shops, commercial establishments, offices, warehouses, hotels, and restaurants. Annual renewal filing before expiry. Compliance advisory on working hours, weekly holidays, overtime provisions, and employee welfare requirements under the Act.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for Shop Act Registration in Chennai
  Shop Act registration is mandatory for all commercial establishments in Tamil Nadu. Operating without registration attracts penalties under Section 30 of the Act. Registration is also a prerequisite for other compliances — GST registration, bank account opening, and labour law compliance. Virtual Auditor ensures correct application filing with proper classification of your establishment type. Our Spencer Plaza office in Chennai provides local support for Inspector of Labour coordination if required.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Document collection — PAN, address proof, employee list, nature of business. Step 2: Application preparation with correct establishment classification. Step 3: Application submission to Inspector of Labour, Chennai. Step 4: Follow-up and query resolution if additional documents requested. Step 5: Registration certificate delivery. Step 6: Renewal tracking and timely application before expiry.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need shop act registration in Chennai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-99622 60333
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: G-131, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002

Virtual Auditor handles company incorporation and related registrations through the MCA portal. Our process is fully digital, using SPICe+ (INC-32), AGILE-PRO, and other integrated forms for seamless registration.

The incorporation process covers: name reservation (RUN/SPICe+ Part A), DIN application for directors, DSC procurement, drafting of MOA and AOA, SPICe+ form filing, PAN/TAN allotment, GST registration, EPFO/ESIC registration (where applicable), and professional tax registration. Post-incorporation, we assist with statutory register maintenance, board resolutions, and annual compliance setup.

Our team has incorporated 500+ companies across diverse sectors. We serve entrepreneurs and businesses in Chennai, Bangalore, Mumbai, and across India with end-to-end incorporation support.

faqs.q: Is shop act registration mandatory in Chennai?
faqs.a: Yes. All commercial establishments, shops, offices, and restaurants in Chennai must register within 30 days of commencing business under the Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Act, 1947. Non-registration attracts penalties under Section 30.

faqs.q: What documents are needed for shop act registration in Chennai?
faqs.a: PAN card, Aadhaar of proprietor/partners/directors, address proof of premises (rent agreement + NOC or ownership proof), nature of business details, and list of employees with joining dates.

faqs.q: How long does shop act registration take in Chennai?
faqs.a: Typically 7-15 working days from application submission. The Inspector of Labour may conduct a site inspection. We follow up proactively to ensure timely issuance.
